description: Recto: Hebrew letter addressed to the judge Ḥananʾel, prefaced with Habakkuk 3:18. Verso: unidentified; the Arabic phrase al-ḥamdu lillāh appears, crossed out, and there is faded Hebrew text at a right angle. (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מכתב עברי מופנה אל השופט חנאנאל, פותח בחבקוק ג:18.
